type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Change in company reporting emission. Previous company used different emission factors that Vertex does not have access to, and 2018 emissions were reported under a >20,000hr/year at site, but employee hours were <20,000/year. Tank emissions were included in 2018, but not included for 2019 as fluids stored have been through a minimum of 1 separator to remove entrained gas.
